elements.description: Typed memo with subject 'FLYING SAUCERS' dated July 10, 1953, from John Edgar Hoover to the Director of Special Investigations, Department of the Air Force, describing a reported encounter with three small animals believed to have landed from a flying saucer near Mableton, Georgia.

Red stamped text '62-83874-334' at the top center. Black stamped text 'RECORDED-124', 'INDEXED-124', and 'EX-103' at the top left. A red rectangular stamp at the bottom right reading 'COMM - FBI JUL 1 0 1953 MAILED 27'. A small red stamp 'ENCLOSURE' is visible on the left margin above a handwritten '124'.

judge.reason: Description A describes visual elements (handwritten annotations, pencil initials, scribbles) that are absent in Description B, which instead describes detailed stamps and labels not mentioned by A, indicating a complete mismatch in the visual content being described.
